description: Outreach to a gutter cleaning vendor should ask about availability and pricing, not give scheduling instructions.

task.title: Schedule gutter cleaning
task.body: Schedule a monthly gutter cleaning at 16617 3rd Dr SE Bothell WA 98012 to prevent potential water damage and ice dams.

context:
Property: 16617 3rd Dr SE, Bothell, WA 98012
Vendor: CleanPro Gutters

criteria: Message asks the vendor about availability rather than telling them when to come
Message asks for a quote or pricing information
Message briefly describes the work needed (gutter cleaning) and mentions the property address
Message does NOT read like a directive or scheduling confirmation — it is an inquiry
Message is 2-3 sentences max, professional and friendly
